intro.title: Quick Start
intro.p1: Riftbound NIGHTS is a trading card game (TCG) where you choose a Champion, build your army, and fight for control of strategic battlefields.
intro.p2: The goal is simple: be the first to reach **8 points** (or 11 in team games). You earn points by taking control of a Battlefield and maintaining it at the start of your turn.

deckbuilding.title: Deck Building
deckbuilding.p1: Your deck is composed of a **Legend**, which defines which domains (colors) you can use, and units, spells, and gear cards.
deckbuilding.p2: You also have a separate **Rune Deck**, which provides the resources to play your cards each turn.

resources.title: Runes & Energy
resources.p1: Each card has an energy cost and sometimes a domain requirement. You pay these costs using your **Runes**.
resources.p2: Runes can be used in two ways: **Exhaust** (turn sideways to generate 1 temporary energy) or **Sacrifice** (return to the rune deck for more powerful effects).

combat.title: Combat & Domains
combat.p1: Units fight using their **Might** (Combat Power). When units from different players are on the same Battlefield, they automatically enter combat at the end of the turn.

keywords.title: Heart of Mastery: Keywords
keywords.description: Mastering Keywords is the most important step to becoming a Riftbound pro.

accelerate.name: Accelerate
accelerate.desc: Optional cost when playing a Unit that allows it to enter ready by paying 1 Energy and recycling a Rune.

action.name: Action
action.desc: Allows an ability or card to be played during Showdowns, even outside your turn.

assault.name: Assault X
assault.desc: Gains +X Might while attacking during combat.

deathknell.name: Deathknell
deathknell.desc: Ability that triggers when the unit with this keyword dies.

deflect.name: Deflect X
deflect.desc: Opponent must pay X additional Power to target this card with spells or abilities.

ganking.name: Ganking
ganking.desc: Movement ability that allows units to move directly between battlefields.

hidden.name: Hidden
hidden.desc: Can be played face down for reduced cost and later revealed as a Reaction.

legion.name: Legion
legion.desc: Effect triggered if you have already played another card this turn.

reaction.name: Reaction
reaction.desc: Special timing that allows responding to opponent actions instantly, resolving before the original action.

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.desc: Allows paying the base cost again to repeat a spell's effect.

shield.name: Shield X
shield.desc: Gains +X Might while defending during combat.

tank.name: Tank
tank.desc: Units with Tank must be assigned lethal damage before any other non-Tank units in the same battlefield.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data while using Riftbound NIGHTS Deck Manager.

### 1. Data Collection
We collect basic information such as email (when creating an account) and collection data for cross-device synchronization. We do not sell your data to third parties.

### 2. Information Usage
We use your data to personalize your experience, save your decks, and provide system functionalities.

### 3. Cookies and Advertising
We may use cookies to improve navigation and display relevant ads through partners like Google AdSense.

### 4. Security
We employ modern security measures like encryption and Supabase authentication to protect your information.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.content:
By accessing Riftbound NIGHTS Deck Manager, you agree to the following terms:

### 1. Service Usage
This site is a utility tool for Riftbound TCG players. Use must be personal and non-commercial.

### 2. Intellectual Property
Riftbound and all related art are properties of Riftbound TCG / League of Legends. This project is a fan tool with no official affiliation.

### 3. Limitation of Liability
The service is provided 'as is'. We are not responsible for data loss or misinterpreted game rules.

### 4. Modifications
We reserve the right to change these terms at any time to improve the service.
